translation_kids: What's the point of wisdom if you don't try to keep others from pain just as you'd keep yourself from it?

translation: Let not a man consent to do those things to another which, he knows, will cause sorrow.
meaning_tamil: ஒருவன் தன்னுடைய வாழ்க்கையில் துன்பமானவை என்று அனுபவித்து அறிந்தவற்றை, மற்றவர்க்குச் செய்யாமலிருக்க வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Let not a man consent to do those things to another which, he knows, will cause sorrow.
translation_kids: Don't agree to do things to others that you know would cause them real sadness.

translation: It is the chief of all goodness not knowingly to do any person evil, even in the lowest degree, and at any time.
meaning_tamil: எவ்வளவிலும், எப்பொழுதும், எவரையும் இழிவுபடுத்தும் செயலை மனத்தால்கூட நினைக்காமல் இருப்பதே முதன்மையான சிறப்பாகும்
meaning_english: It is the chief of all goodness not knowingly to do any person evil, even in the lowest degree, and at any time.
translation_kids: The greatest good of all is to never knowingly cause harm to anyone — not even the smallest harm.

translation: Why does a man inflict upon other creatures those sufferings, which he has found by experience are sufferings to himself .
meaning_tamil: பிறர் தரும் துன்பத்தால் தனக்கேற்படும் துன்பத்தை உணர்ந்தவன் அந்தத் துன்பத்தைப் பிற உயிர்களுக்குத் தரவும் கூடாதல்லவா?
meaning_english: Why does a man inflict upon other creatures those sufferings, which he has found by experience are sufferings to himself .
translation_kids: Why would anyone choose to make others feel the same pain they themselves hate to feel?

translation: If a man inflict sorrow upon others in the morning, it will come upon him unsought in the very evening.
meaning_tamil: பிறருக்குத் தீங்கு விளைவித்துவிட்டோம் என்று ஒருவர் மகிழ்ந்து கொண்டிருக்கும்போதே, அதேபோன்ற தீங்கு அவரையே தாக்கும்
meaning_english: If a man inflict sorrow upon others in the morning, it will come upon him unsought in the very evening.
translation_kids: If you cause pain to others in the morning, that same pain will find you before the day is done.

translation: Sorrow will come upon those who cause pain to others; therfore those, who desire to be free from sorrow, give no pain to others.
meaning_tamil: தீங்கு செய்தவருக்கே தீங்குகள் வந்து சேரும்; எனவே தீங்கற்ற வாழ்வை விரும்புகிறவர்கள், பிறருக்குத் தீங்கிழைத்தல் கூடாது
meaning_english: Sorrow will come upon those who cause pain to others; therfore those, who desire to be free from sorrow, give no pain to others.
translation_kids: Those who hurt others will find sorrow coming for them — so those who want peace never cause pain.

translation: Never to destroy life is the sum of all good conduct The destruction of life leads to every evil.
meaning_tamil: எந்த உயிரையும் கொல்லாதிருப்பதே அறச்செயலாகும் கொலை செய்தல் தீயவினைகள் அனைத்தையும் விளைவிக்கும்
meaning_english: Never to destroy life is the sum of all good conduct The destruction of life leads to every evil.
translation_kids: Never taking a life is the foundation of all good behavior — killing leads to every kind of evil.

translation: The chief of all (the goodness) which authors have summed up, is the partaking of food that has been shared.
meaning_tamil: இருப்போர் இல்லாதோர் என்றில்லாமல், கிடைத்ததைப் பகிர்ந்துகொண்டு, எல்லா உயிர்களும் வாழ வேண்டும் என்ற சமநிலைக் கொள்கைக்கு ஈடானது வேறு எதுவுமே இல்லை
meaning_english: The chief of all (the goodness) which authors have summed up, is the partaking of food that has been shared with others, and the preservation of the mainfold life of other creatures.
translation_kids: The best behavior of all is sharing your food with others before you eat.

translation: Not to destroy life is an incomparably (great) good next to it in goodness ranks freedom from falsehood.
meaning_tamil: அறங்களின் வரிசையில் முதலில் கொல்லாமையும் அதற்கடுத்துப் பொய்யாமையும் இடம் பெறுகின்றன
meaning_english: Not to destroy life is an incomparably (great) good next to it in goodness ranks freedom from falsehood.
translation_kids: Not harming any living thing is incredibly good — and right after that comes always telling the truth.

translation: Good path is that which considers how it may avoid killing any creature.
meaning_tamil: எந்த உயிரையும் கொல்லக் கூடாது எனும் நெறி காப்பதுதான் நல்லற வழி எனப்படும்
meaning_english: Good path is that which considers how it may avoid killing any creature.
translation_kids: The right path is the one that asks at every step: am I hurting any living creature here?

translation: Of all those who, fearing the permanence of earthly births, have abandoned desire, he is the chief who, fearing (the.
meaning_tamil: உலகியல் நிலையை வெறுத்துத் துறவு பூண்டவர் எல்லோரையும்விடக் கொலையை வெறுத்துக் கொல்லாமையைக் கடைப்பிடிப்பவரே சிறந்தவராவார்
meaning_english: Of all those who, fearing the permanence of earthly births, have abandoned desire, he is the chief who, fearing (the guilt of) murder, considers how he may avoid the destruction of life.
translation_kids: Among all those who gave up wanting things because they feared being reborn, the greatest are those who fear harming others.

translation: Yama, the destroyer of life, will not attack the life of him, who acts under the strong will of never destroying life.
meaning_tamil: கொலை செய்யாமையை வாழ்வில் அறநெறியாகக் கொண்டவரின் பெருமையை வியந்து, சாவுகூட அவர் உயிரைப் பறிக்கத் தயங்கி நிற்கும்
meaning_english: Yama, the destroyer of life, will not attack the life of him, who acts under the strong will of never destroying life.
translation_kids: Death itself will not come for the life of anyone who is truly committed to never harming any living thing.

translation: Let no one do that which would destroy the life of another, although he should by so doing, lose his own life.
meaning_tamil: தன்னுயிரே போவதாக இருப்பினும்கூட அதற்காக இன்னொரு உயிரைப் போக்கும் செயலில் ஈடுபடக்கூடாது
meaning_english: Let no one do that which would destroy the life of another, although he should by so doing, lose his own life.
translation_kids: Never take the life of another — even if it means losing your own.

translation: The advantage which might flow from destroying life in sacrifice, is dishonor to the wise (who renounced the world), even.
meaning_tamil: பெரிதாக நன்மை தரக்கூடிய அளவுக்கு ஒரு கொலை பயன்படக் கூடுமெனினும், நல்ல பண்புடைய மக்கள், அந்த நன்மையை இழிவானதாகவே கருதுவார்கள்
meaning_english: The advantage which might flow from destroying life in sacrifice, is dishonor to the wise (who renounced the world), even although it should be said to be productive of great good.
translation_kids: Any benefit gained by taking a life in a ceremony is actually a source of shame for the truly wise.

translation: To minds of them who what is vileness know.
meaning_tamil: பகுத்தறிவை இழந்து செயல்படும் கொலைகாரர்களைச் சான்றோர் உள்ளம், இழிதகைப் பிறவிகளாகவே கருதும்
meaning_english: To minds of them who what is vileness know.
translation_kids: Those who truly know what is wrong and shameful carry that wisdom deep inside them.

translation: (The wise) will say that men of diseased bodies, who live in degradation and in poverty, are those who separated.
meaning_tamil: வறுமையும் நோயும் மிகுந்த தீய வாழ்க்கையில் உழல்வோர், ஏற்கனவே கொலைகள் பல செய்தவராக இருப்பர் என்று முன்னோர் கூறுவர்
meaning_english: (The wise) will say that men of diseased bodies, who live in degradation and in poverty, are those who separated the life from the body of animals (in a former birth).
translation_kids: Wise people say that those living in suffering and poverty chose cruelty in a previous life.

translation: That ignorance which considers those things to be stable which are not so, is dishonor (to the wise).
meaning_tamil: நிலையற்றவைகளை நிலையானவை என நம்புகின்ற அறியாமை மிக இழிவானதாகும்
meaning_english: That ignorance which considers those things to be stable which are not so, is dishonor (to the wise).
translation_kids: Treating things that don't last as if they are permanent is a form of shame for those who should know better.

translation: The getting of wealth is like the gathering together of an assembly for a theatre; its expenditure is like the breaking up of that assembly.
meaning_tamil: சேர்த்து வைத்த பணமும் சொத்தும் ஒருவரை விட்டுப் போவது, கூத்து முடிந்ததும் மக்கள் அரங்கத்தை விட்டுக் கலைந்து செல்வதைப் போன்றதாகும்
meaning_english: The getting of wealth is like the gathering together of an assembly for a theatre; its expenditure is like the breaking up of that assembly.
translation_kids: Gaining wealth is like a crowd gathering for a show — spending it is like everyone going home after.

translation: Wealth is not lasting; let those who obtain it immediately practise those (goodness) which are lasting forever.
meaning_tamil: நம்மை வந்தடையும் செல்வம் நிலையற்றது என்பதை உணர்ந்து அதைக் கொண்டு அப்பொழுதே நிலையான நற்செயல்களில் ஈடுபட வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Wealth is not lasting; let those who obtain it immediately practise those (goodness) which are lasting forever.
translation_kids: Wealth doesn't last — so anyone who gets it should immediately use it to do things that do last.

translation: Time, which shows itself (to the ignorant) as if it were something (real) is in the estimation of the wise.
meaning_tamil: வாழ்க்கையைப் பற்றி உணர்ந்தவர்கள், நாள் என்பது ஒருவரின் ஆயுளை அறுத்துக் குறைத்துக் கொண்டேயிருக்கும் வாள் என்று அறிவார்கள்
meaning_english: Time, which shows itself (to the ignorant) as if it were something (real) is in the estimation of the wise (only) a saw which cuts down life.
translation_kids: Time, which looks real to those who don't pay attention, is actually very small in a wise person's eyes.

translation: Let good deeds be done quickly, before the hiccup comes making the tongue silent.
meaning_tamil: வாழ்க்கையின் நிலையாமையை உணர்ந்து நம் உயிர் இருக்கும் போதே உயர்ந்த நற்பணிகளை ஆற்றிட முனைய வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Let good deeds be done quickly, before the hiccup comes making the tongue silent.
translation_kids: Do good things quickly — before the day comes when your tongue falls silent forever.

translation: This world has the greatness that one who yesterday was is not today.
meaning_tamil: இந்த உலகமானது, நேற்று உயிருடன் இருந்தவரை இன்று இல்லாமல் செய்து விட்டோம் என்ற அகந்தையைப் பெருமையாகப் கொண்டதாகும்
meaning_english: This world has the greatness that one who yesterday was is not today.
translation_kids: This world shows us something amazing — someone alive yesterday may simply not be here today.

translation: Innumerable are the thoughts which occupy the mind of (the unwise), who know not that they shall live another moment.
meaning_tamil: ஒரு பொழுதுகூட வாழ்க்கையைப் பற்றி உண்மையைச் சிந்தித்து அறியாதவர்களே, ஆசைக்கோர் அளவின்றி மனக் கோட்டைகள் கட்டுவார்கள்
meaning_english: Innumerable are the thoughts which occupy the mind of (the unwise), who know not that they shall live another moment.
translation_kids: People who don't realize they might not live another moment pile up endless worries in their heads.

translation: The love of the soul to the body is like (the love of) a bird to its egg which it.
meaning_tamil: உடலுக்கும் உயிருக்கும் உள்ள உறவு முட்டைக்கும் பறவைக் குஞ்சுக்கும் உண்டான உறவு போன்றதுதான்
meaning_english: The love of the soul to the body is like (the love of) a bird to its egg which it flies away from and leaves empty.
translation_kids: The soul's attachment to the body is like a bird's love for an egg it must eventually leave behind.

translation: Death is like sleep; birth is like awaking from it.
meaning_tamil: நிலையற்ற வாழ்க்கையில், உறக்கத்திற்குப் பிறகு விழிப்பதைப் போன்றது பிறப்பு; திரும்ப விழிக்க முடியாத மீளா உறக்கம் கொள்வதே இறப்பு
meaning_english: Death is like sleep; birth is like awaking from it.
translation_kids: Death is just like sleep — and being born again is just like waking up.

translation: It seems as if the soul, which takes a temporary shelter in a body, had not attained a home.
meaning_tamil: உடலுடன் தங்கியுள்ள உயிருக்கு அதனைப் பிரிந்தால் வேறு புகலிடம் கிடையாது
meaning_english: It seems as if the soul, which takes a temporary shelter in a body, had not attained a home.
translation_kids: The soul moving from body to body seems like someone who hasn't quite found their real home yet.

translation: Whatever thing, a man has renounced, by that thing; he cannot suffer pain.
meaning_tamil: ஒருவன் பல வகையான பற்றுகளில் எந்த ஒன்றை விட்டு விட்டாலும், குறிப்பிட்ட அந்தப் பற்று காரணமாக வரும் துன்பம், அவனை அணுகுவதில்லை
meaning_english: Whatever thing, a man has renounced, by that thing; he cannot suffer pain.
translation_kids: Whatever a person has truly let go of can never cause them any more pain.

translation: After a man has renounced (all things), there will still be many things in this world (which he may enjoy);.
meaning_tamil: ஒருவனைத் துன்பம் துளைத்தெடுக்காமல் இருக்க எல்லாம் இருக்கும் போதே அவற்றைக் துறந்து விடுவானேயானால், அவன் உலகில் பெறக்கூடிய இன்பங்கள் பலவாகும்
meaning_english: After a man has renounced (all things), there will still be many things in this world (which he may enjoy); if he should desire them, let him, while it is time abandon (the world).
translation_kids: Once you've given up what matters most, you'll find there's still plenty left to enjoy in this world.

translation: Let the five senses be destroyed; and at the same time, let everything be abandoned that (the holy person) has (formerly) desired.
meaning_tamil: ஐம் புலன்களையும் அடக்கி வெல்வதும், அப்புலன்கள் விரும்புகின்றவற்றையெல்லாம் விட்டுவிடுவதும் துறவுக்கு இலக்கணமாகும்
meaning_english: Let the five senses be destroyed; and at the same time, let everything be abandoned that (the holy person) has (formerly) desired.
translation_kids: Quiet all five senses — and at the same time, release everything you ever used to want.

translation: To be altogether very poor is the proper condition of those who perform austerities; if they have anything, it will.
meaning_tamil: ஒரு பற்றும் இல்லாதிருத்தலே துறவுக்கு ஏற்றதாகும் ஓன்றன் மேல் பற்று வைப்பினும், அது மேன்மேலும் பற்றுகளைப் பெருக்கி மயங்கச் செய்துவிடும்
meaning_english: To be altogether very poor is the proper condition of those who perform austerities; if they have anything, it will change (their resolution) and bring them back to their confused state.
translation_kids: For someone practicing true self-discipline, having nothing is the right condition — having things holds them back.

translation: What means the addition of other things those who are attempting to cut off (future) births, when even their body is too much (for them).
meaning_tamil: பிறந்ததால் ஏற்படும் துன்பத்தைப் போக்க முயல்கின்ற துறவிகளுக்கு அவர்களின் உடம்பே மிகையான ஒன்றாக இருக்கும்போது, அதற்கு மேலும் வேறு தொடர்பு எதற்காக?
meaning_english: What means the addition of other things those who are attempting to cut off (future) births, when even their body is too much (for them).
translation_kids: When you're trying to cut off the cycle of rebirth, why add more things — even your own body feels like too much?

translation: Shall enter realms above the powers divine.
meaning_tamil: யான், எனது என்கின்ற ஆணவத்தை அறவே விலக்கி விட்டவன், வான்புகழையும் மிஞ்சுகின்ற உலகப் புகழுக்கு உரியவனாவான்
meaning_english: Shall enter realms above the powers divine.
translation_kids: Those who go beyond all desire will reach realms even beyond what gods can reach.

translation: Sorrows will never let go their hold of those who give not up their hold of desire.
meaning_tamil: பற்றுகளைப் பற்றிக்கொண்டு விடாதவர்களைத் துன்பங்களும் விடாமல் பற்றிக் கொள்கின்றன
meaning_english: Sorrows will never let go their hold of those who give not up their hold of desire.
translation_kids: Sorrow never lets go of those who never let go of desire.

translation: Those who have entirely renounced (all things and all desire) have obtained (absorption into God); all others wander in confusion,.
meaning_tamil: அரைகுறையாக இல்லாமல் அனைத்தும் துறந்தவர்களே உயர்ந்த நிலையை அடைவார்கள் அவ்வாறு துறவாதவர்கள் அறியாமையென்னும் வலையில் சிக்கியவர்களாவார்கள்
meaning_english: Those who have entirely renounced (all things and all desire) have obtained (absorption into God); all others wander in confusion, entangled in the net of (many) births.
translation_kids: Those who have truly given up everything have reached peace — everyone else keeps wandering in confusion.

translation: At the moment in which desire has been abandoned, (other) births will be cut off; when that has not been done, instability will be seen.
meaning_tamil: பற்றுகளைத் துறந்துவிட்டால், பிறப்பில் ஏற்படும் இன்ப துன்பங்கள் வருவதில்லை இல்லையேல், அந்த இன்ப துன்பங்கள் மாறிமாறி வரக்கூடிய நிலையாமை தோன்றும்
meaning_english: At the moment in which desire has been abandoned, (other) births will be cut off; when that has not been done, instability will be seen.
translation_kids: The moment you drop desire, the cycle of being born again is cut — hold onto it and you stay unstable.

translation: Desire the desire of Him who is without desire; in order to give up desire, desire that desire.
meaning_tamil: எதிலும் பற்றில்லாதவராக யார் இருக்கிறாரோ அவரிடம் மட்டும் பற்றுக் கொள்ள வேண்டும் துறவறத்தினர் தம் பற்றுகளை விட்டொழிப்பதற்கு அத்தகையோரிடம் கொள்ளும் பற்றுதான் துணை நிற்கும்
meaning_english: Desire the desire of Him who is without desire; in order to give up desire, desire that desire.
translation_kids: Want to give up all desire? Start by desiring the one thing worth wanting — to be like God, who wants nothing.

translation: Inglorious births are produced by the confusion (of mind) which considers those things to be real which are not real.
meaning_tamil: பொய்யான ஒரு பொருளை மெய்ப்பொருள் என்று மயங்கி நம்புகிறவனின் வாழ்க்கை சிறப்பாக அமையாது
meaning_english: Inglorious births are produced by the confusion (of mind) which considers those things to be real which are not real.
translation_kids: Being confused about what is real causes you to be born again and again into meaningless lives.

translation: A clear, undimmed vision of things will deliver its possessors from the darkness of future births, and confer the felicity (of heaven).
meaning_tamil: மயக்கம் தெளிந்து மாசற்ற உண்மையை உணர்ந்தால் அறியாமை அகன்று நலம் தோன்றும்
meaning_english: A clear, undimmed vision of things will deliver its possessors from the darkness of future births, and confer the felicity (of heaven).
translation_kids: Seeing clearly — without confusion — will free you from future rebirths and bring you true joy.

translation: Heaven is nearer than earth to those men of purified minds who are freed from from doubt.
meaning_tamil: ஐயப்பாடுகளைத் தெளிந்த ஆராய்ச்சி வாயிலாகத் தீர்த்துக் கொண்டவர்களுக்குப் பூமியைவிட வானம் மிக அருகில் இருப்பதாகக் கருதுகின்ற ஊக்கம் ஏற்படும்
meaning_english: Heaven is nearer than earth to those men of purified minds who are freed from from doubt.
translation_kids: Heaven feels closer than earth to those whose minds are clear and free from doubt.

translation: Even those who have all the knowledge which can be attained by the five senses, will derive no benefit from.
meaning_tamil: உண்மையைக் கண்டறிந்து தெளிவடையாதவர்கள், தமது ஐம்புலன்களையும் அடக்கி வெற்றி கண்டிருந்தாலும் கூட அதனால் அவர்களுக்கு எந்தப் பயனும் இல்லை
meaning_english: Even those who have all the knowledge which can be attained by the five senses, will derive no benefit from it, if they are without a knowledge of the true nature of things.
translation_kids: Even people who have learned everything through all five senses will get nothing from it if their minds aren't clear.

translation: (True) knowledge is the understanding concerning every thing of whatever kind, that that thing is the true thing.
meaning_tamil: வெளித்தோற்றத்தைப் பார்த்து ஏமாந்து விடாமல், அதுபற்றிய உண்மையை உணர்வதுதான் அறிவுடைமையாகும்
meaning_english: (True) knowledge is the understanding concerning every thing of whatever kind, that that thing is the true thing.
translation_kids: True wisdom is simply understanding every single thing for exactly what it really is.

translation: They, who in this birth have learned to know the True Being, enter the road which returns not into this world.
meaning_tamil: துறவற வாழ்வுக்குத் தகுதியுடையவராகச் செய்திடும் அனைத்தையும் கற்று, உண்மைப் பொருள் உணர்ந்து அதன்படி ஒழுகுபவர், மீண்டும் இல்லற வாழ்க்கையை விரும்ப மாட்டார்கள்
meaning_english: They, who in this birth have learned to know the True Being, enter the road which returns not into this world.
translation_kids: Those who truly come to know the real truth in this life step onto a path they will never have to walk back from.

translation: Let it not be thought that there is another birth for him whose mind having thoroughly considered (all it has.
meaning_tamil: உண்மையை ஆராய்ந்து உறுதியாக உணர்பவர்கள் மீண்டும் பிறப்பு உண்டு எனக் கருத மாட்டார்கள்
meaning_english: Let it not be thought that there is another birth for him whose mind having thoroughly considered (all it has been taught) has known the True Being.
translation_kids: Anyone whose mind has fully understood reality and let go of everything — there is no more rebirth for them.

translation: True knowledge consists in the removal of ignorance; which is (the cause of) births, and the understanding of the True.
meaning_tamil: அடுத்த பிறப்பு எனக் கூறப்படும் அறியாமையைப் போக்கித் தெளிந்த உண்மையை நிலைநாட்டுவதுதான் அறிவுடைமையாகும்
meaning_english: True knowledge consists in the removal of ignorance; which is (the cause of) births, and the understanding of the True Being who is (the bestower of) heaven.
translation_kids: True wisdom means removing ignorance, which causes rebirth, and understanding what is really real.

translation: He who so lives as to know Him who is the support of all things and abandon all desire, will.
meaning_tamil: துன்பங்கள் நம்மைச் சாராமல் இருக்க வேண்டுமானால், அத்துன்பங்களுக்குக் காரணமானவற்றை உணர்ந்து அவற்றின் மீதுள்ள பற்றை விலக்கிக் கொள்ள வேண்டும்
meaning_english: He who so lives as to know Him who is the support of all things and abandon all desire, will be freed from the evils which would otherwise cleave to him and destroy (his efforts after absorption).
translation_kids: Anyone who truly understands what holds everything together and gives up all desire will be permanently free.

translation: If the very names of these three things, desire, anger, and confusion of mind, be destroyed, then will also perish evils (which flow from them).
meaning_tamil: விருப்பு, வெறுப்பு, அறியாமை இவற்றுக்கு இடம் தராதவர்களை நெருங்குகிற துன்பம் அழிந்துவிடும்
meaning_english: If the very names of these three things, desire, anger, and confusion of mind, be destroyed, then will also perish evils (which flow from them).
translation_kids: If you destroy even the very names of desire, anger, and confusion, the evils they cause will vanish too.

translation: (The wise) say that the seed, which produces unceasing births, at all times, to all creatures, is desire.
meaning_tamil: ஆசையை, எல்லா உயிர்களிடமும், எல்லாக் காலத்திலும் தவறாமல் தோன்றி முளைக்கும் விதை என்று கூறலாம்
meaning_english: (The wise) say that the seed, which produces unceasing births, at all times, to all creatures, is desire.
translation_kids: Wise people say that desire — all by itself — is the seed that keeps planting new births forever.

translation: If anything be desired, freedom from births should be desired; that (freedom from births) will be attained by desiring to be without desire.
meaning_tamil: விரும்புவதானால் பிறக்காமலே இருந்திருக்கவேண்டும் என்று ஒருவன் எண்ணுகிற அளவுக்கு ஏற்படுகிற துன்ப நிலை, ஆசைகளை ஒழிக்காவிடில் வரும்
meaning_english: If anything be desired, freedom from births should be desired; that (freedom from births) will be attained by desiring to be without desire.
translation_kids: If you must want something, want freedom from rebirth — and that comes by wanting to want nothing.

translation: There is in this world no excellence equal to freedom from desire; and even in that world, there is nothing like it.
meaning_tamil: தீமை விளைவிக்கும் ஆசைகளை வேண்டாம் என்று புறக்கணிப்பதைப் போன்ற செல்வம் இங்கு எதுவுமில்லை; வேறு எங்கும் கூட அத்தகைய ஒப்பற்ற செல்வம் இல்லையென்றே கூறலாம்
meaning_english: There is in this world no excellence equal to freedom from desire; and even in that world, there is nothing like it.
translation_kids: There is no greater achievement in this world than being free from desire — and it's the same in the next world.

translation: Purity (of mind) consists in freedom from desire; and that (freedom from desire) is the fruit of the love of truth.
meaning_tamil: தூய்மை என்பது பேராசையற்ற தன்மையாகும் அத்தூய்மை வாய்மையை நாடுவோர்க்கே வாய்க்கும்
meaning_english: Purity (of mind) consists in freedom from desire; and that (freedom from desire) is the fruit of the love of truth.
translation_kids: A truly pure mind is one free from desire — and that freedom grows out of a love for what is true.

translation: They are said to be free (from future birth) who are freed from desire; all others (who, whatever else they.
meaning_tamil: ஆசையனைத்தும் விட்டவரே துறவி எனப்படுவார் முற்றும் துறவாதவர், தூய துறவியாக மாட்டார்
meaning_english: They are said to be free (from future birth) who are freed from desire; all others (who, whatever else they may be free from, are not freed from desire) are not thus free.
translation_kids: Those who are truly free from desire are truly free — everyone else, no matter what they have, is still trapped.

translation: It is the chief duty of (an holy person) to watch against desire with (jealous) fear; for it has power to deceive (and destroy) him.
meaning_tamil: ஒருவரை வஞ்சித்துக் கெடுப்பதற்குக் காரணமாக இருப்பது ஆசையேயாகும் எனவே, ஆசைக்கு அடிமையாகக் கூடாது என்ற அச்சத்துடன் வாழ வேண்டும்
meaning_english: It is the chief duty of (an holy person) to watch against desire with (jealous) fear; for it has power to deceive (and destroy) him.
translation_kids: Watching out for desire is the most important duty — it has the power to trick and destroy even the wisest.

translation: If a man thoroughly cut off all desire, the deeds, which confer immortality, will come to him, in the path in which he seeks them.
meaning_tamil: கெடாமல் வாழ்வதற்குரிய நிலை, ஒருவன் விரும்புமாறு வாய்ப்பதற்கு, அவன் பேராசைக் குணத்தை முற்றிலும் ஒழித்தவனாக இருக்க வேண்டும்
meaning_english: If a man thoroughly cut off all desire, the deeds, which confer immortality, will come to him, in the path in which he seeks them.
translation_kids: Anyone who completely cuts off desire will naturally find their way to things that bring lasting good.

translation: There is no sorrow to those who are without desire; but where that is, (sorrow) will incessantly come, more and more.
meaning_tamil: ஆசை இல்லாதவர்களுக்குத் துன்பம் இல்லை ஆசை உண்டானால், அதைத் தொடர்ந்து துன்பமும் மேலும் மேலும் வந்து கொண்டிருக்கும்
meaning_english: There is no sorrow to those who are without desire; but where that is, (sorrow) will incessantly come, more and more.
translation_kids: Those without desire have no sorrow — but where desire lives, sorrow keeps growing, more and more.

translation: Even while in this body, joy will never depart (from the mind, in which) desire, that sorrow of sorrows, has been destroyed.
meaning_tamil: பெருந்துன்பம் தரக்கூடிய பேராசை ஒழிந்தால் வாழ்வில் இன்பம் விடாமல் தொடரும்
meaning_english: Even while in this body, joy will never depart (from the mind, in which) desire, that sorrow of sorrows, has been destroyed.
translation_kids: Even while still in this body, true joy never leaves the person who has destroyed desire — the source of all sorrow.

translation: The removal of desire, whose nature it is never to be satisfied, will immediately confer a nature that can never be changed.
meaning_tamil: இயல்பாகவே எழும் அடங்காத பேராசையை அகற்றி வாழும் நிலை, நீங்காத இன்பத்தை இயல்பாகவே தரக்கூடியதாகும்
meaning_english: The removal of desire, whose nature it is never to be satisfied, will immediately confer a nature that can never be changed.
translation_kids: Getting rid of desire — which is never satisfied — immediately gives you a peace that can never be shaken.

translation: Never giving up comes from a successful fate, and idleness from an adverse fate.
meaning_tamil: ஆக்கத்திற்கான இயற்கை நிலை சோர்வு தலை காட்டாத ஊக்கத்தைக் கொடுக்கும் ஊக்கத்தின் அழிவுக்கான இயற்கைநிலை சோம்பலை ஏற்படுத்தும்
meaning_english: Never giving up comes from a successful fate, and idleness from an adverse fate.
translation_kids: Hard work comes from good fortune — and laziness comes from bad fortune.

translation: An adverse fate produces folly, and a successful fate produces enlarged knowledge.
meaning_tamil: அழிவுதரும் இயற்கை நிலை, அறியாமையை உண்டாக்கும்; ஆக்கம் தரும் இயற்கை நிலை, அதற்கேற்ப அறிவை விரிவாக்கும்
meaning_english: An adverse fate produces folly, and a successful fate produces enlarged knowledge.
translation_kids: Bad fortune makes people foolish — and good fortune helps people think bigger and clearer.

translation: Although (a man) may study the most polished treatises, the knowledge which fate has decreed to him will still prevail.
meaning_tamil: கூரிய அறிவு வழங்கக் கூடிய நூல்களை ஒருவர் கற்றிருந்த போதிலும் அவரது இயற்கை அறிவே மேலோங்கி நிற்கும்
meaning_english: Although (a man) may study the most polished treatises, the knowledge which fate has decreed to him will still prevail.
translation_kids: No matter how much someone studies great books, what fate has given them to understand is what they'll understand.

translation: There are (through fate) two different natures in the world, hence the difference (observable in men) in (their getting of).
meaning_tamil: உலகின் இயற்கை நிலை இரு வேறுபட்டதாகும் ஒருவர் செல்வமுடையவராகவும், ஒருவர் அறிவுடையவராகவும் இருப்பதே அந்த வேறுபாடாகும்
meaning_english: There are (through fate) two different natures in the world, hence the difference (observable in men) in (their getting of) wealth, and in their attainment of knowledge.
translation_kids: Because of fate, people are born with different natures — that's why some gain things easily and others struggle.

translation: In the getting of property, every thing favourable becomes unfavourable, and (on the other hand) everything unfavourable becomes favourable, (through the power of fate).
meaning_tamil: நல்ல செயல்களை ஆற்ற முற்படும்போது அவை தீமையில் போய் முடிந்துவிடுவதும், தீய செயல்களை ஆற்றிட முனையும்போது அவை நல்லவைகளாக முடிந்து விடுவதும் இயற்கை நிலை எனப்படும்
meaning_english: In the getting of property, every thing favourable becomes unfavourable, and (on the other hand) everything unfavourable becomes favourable, (through the power of fate).
translation_kids: Because of fate, favorable things can turn unfavorable — and unfavorable things can turn favorable.

translation: Whatever is not conferred by fate cannot be preserved although it be guarded with most painful care; and that, which.
meaning_tamil: தனக்கு உரிமையல்லாதவற்றை எவ்வளவுதான் பாதுகாப்பாக வைத்தாலும் அவை தங்காமல் போய்விடக் கூடும்; உரிமையுள்ளவற்றை எங்கே கொண்டு போய்ப் போட்டாலும் அவை எங்கும் போகமாட்டா
meaning_english: Whatever is not conferred by fate cannot be preserved although it be guarded with most painful care; and that, which fate has made his, cannot be lost, although one should even take it and throw it away.
translation_kids: Whatever fate hasn't given you can't be kept no matter how hard you try — and what fate gives, nothing can take away.

translation: Even those who gather together millions will only enjoy them, as it has been determined by the disposer (of all things).
meaning_tamil: வகுத்து முறைப்படுத்திய வாழ்க்கை நெறியை ஒட்டி நடக்கா விட்டால் கோடிப் பொருள் குவித்தாலும், அதன் பயனை அனுபவிப்பது என்பது அரிதேயாகும்
meaning_english: Even those who gather together millions will only enjoy them, as it has been determined by the disposer (of all things).
translation_kids: Even those who gather millions will only enjoy what fate has decided they should enjoy.

translation: The very poor will give up desire (and become holy person), if (fate) do not make them suffer the hindrances.
meaning_tamil: நுகர்வதற்குரியது எதுவுமில்லை என்ற உறுதியினால், தம்மை வருத்தக்கூடிய உணர்வுகள் வந்து வருத்தாமல் நீங்கிவிடுமானால் துறவறம் மேற்கொள்வர்
meaning_english: The very poor will give up desire (and become holy person), if (fate) do not make them suffer the hindrances to which they are liable, and they pass away.
translation_kids: Even the very poor will let go of wanting things if fate doesn't keep throwing obstacles in their way.

translation: How is it that those, who are pleased with good fortune, trouble themselves when evil comes, (since both are equally the decree of fate) .
meaning_tamil: நன்மையும் தீமையும் வாழ்க்கையில் மாறி மாறி வரும். நன்மை கண்டு மகிழ்கிறவர்கள், தீமை விளையும்போது மட்டும் மனம் கலங்குவது ஏன்?
meaning_english: How is it that those, who are pleased with good fortune, trouble themselves when evil comes, (since both are equally the decree of fate) .
translation_kids: Why do people celebrate good fortune but panic when bad fortune arrives — since both come from fate?

translation: What is stronger than fate ?.
meaning_tamil: இயற்கை நிலையை மாற்றி மற்றொரு செயற்கை நிலையை அமைத்திட முனைந்தாலும், இயற்கை நிலையே முதன்மையாக வந்து நிற்பதால் அதைவிட வலிமையானவையாக வேறு எவை இருக்கின்றன?
meaning_english: What is stronger than fate ? If we think of an expedient (to avert it), it will itself be with us before (the thought).
translation_kids: What in this world is stronger than fate?

translation: He who has these six things, an army, a people, wealth, advisor, friends and a fort, is a lion among kings.
meaning_tamil: ஆற்றல்மிகு படை, அறிவார்ந்த குடிமக்கள், குறையா வளம், குறையற்ற அமைச்சு, முரிபடாத நட்பு, மோதியழிக்க முடியாத அரண் ஆகிய ஆறு சிறப்புகளும் உடையதே அரசுகளுக்கிடையே ஆண் சிங்கம் போன்ற அரசாகும்
meaning_english: He who has these six things, an army, a people, wealth, advisor, friends and a fort, is a lion among kings.
translation_kids: A king who has an army, a loyal people, wealth, wise advisors, good friends, and a strong fort is truly powerful.

translation: Never to fail in these four things, fearlessness, liberality, wisdom, and energy, is the kingly character.
meaning_tamil: துணிவு, இரக்க சிந்தை, அறிவாற்றல், உயர்ந்த குறிக்கோளை எட்டும் முயற்சி ஆகிய நான்கு பண்புகளும் அரசுக்குரிய தகுதிகளாகும்
meaning_english: Never to fail in these four things, fearlessness, liberality, wisdom, and energy, is the kingly character.
translation_kids: A true king never fails in four things — courage, generosity, wisdom, and the drive to act.

translation: These three things, viz, vigilance, learning, and bravery, should never be wanting in the rule of a country.
meaning_tamil: காலம் தாழ்த்தாத விரைவான நடவடிக்கைகளும், அறிவுடைமையும், துணிவும் நாடாளுகின்றவர்களுக்குத் தேவையானவையும், நீங்காமல் நிலைத்திருக்க வேண்டியவையுமான பண்புகளாகும்
meaning_english: These three things, viz, vigilance, learning, and bravery, should never be wanting in the rule of a country.
translation_kids: Three things must never be missing in a king's rule — alertness, knowledge, and bravery.

translation: He is a king who, with manly modesty, swerves not from goodness, and refrains from vice.
meaning_tamil: அறநெறி தவறாமலும், குற்றமேதும் இழைக்காமலும், வீரத்துடனும், மானத்துடனும் ஆட்சி நடத்துபவர்களே சிறந்தவர்களாவார்கள்
meaning_english: He is a king who, with manly modesty, swerves not from goodness, and refrains from vice.
translation_kids: A true king holds onto goodness with quiet confidence and stays away from doing wrong.

translation: He is a king who is able to get (wealth), to lay it up, to guard, and to distribute it.
meaning_tamil: முறையாக நிதி ஆதாரங்களை வகுத்து, அரசாங்கக் கருவூலத்திற்கான வருவாயைப் பெருக்கி, அதைப் பாதுக்காத்துத் திட்டமிட்டுச் செலவிடுவதுதான் திறமையான நல்லாட்சிக்கு இலக்கணமாகும்
meaning_english: He is a king who is able to get (wealth), to lay it up, to guard, and to distribute it.
translation_kids: A real king knows how to earn wealth, save it, protect it, and give it away wisely.

translation: The whole world will exalt the country of the king who is easy of access, and who is free from harsh language.
meaning_tamil: காட்சிக்கு எளிமையும், கடுஞ்சொல் கூறாத இனிய பண்பாடும் உடைய அரசைத்தான் உலகம் புகழும்
meaning_english: The whole world will exalt the country of the king who is easy of access, and who is free from harsh language.
translation_kids: The whole world will lift up the country of a king who is easy to talk to and never speaks harshly.

translation: The world will praise and submit itself to the mind of the king who is able to give with affability,.
meaning_tamil: வாக்கில் இனிமையும், பிறர்க்கு வழங்கிக் காத்திடும் தன்மையும் கொண்டவர்க்கு இவ்வையகமே வசப்படும்
meaning_english: The world will praise and submit itself to the mind of the king who is able to give with affability, and to protect all who come to him.
translation_kids: People everywhere will praise and follow a king who gives generously and speaks with warmth and respect.

translation: That king, will be respect a God among men, who performs his own duties, and protects (his people).
meaning_tamil: நீதிநெறியுடன் அரசு நடத்தி, மக்களைக் காப்பாற்றும் ஆட்சியாளன்தான் மக்களுக்குத் தலைவன் எனப் போற்றப்படுவான்
meaning_english: That king, will be respect a God among men, who performs his own duties, and protects (his people).
translation_kids: A king who does their duty and truly protects the people will be looked up to like a god among people.

translation: The whole world will dwell under the umbrella of the king, who can bear words that embitter the ear.
meaning_tamil: காதைக் குடையக்கூடிய கடுஞ்சொற்களையும் பொறுத்துக் கொள்கிற பண்பாளரின் அரசுக்குத்தான் மக்களிடம் மதிப்பு இருக்கும்
meaning_english: The whole world will dwell under the umbrella of the king, who can bear words that embitter the ear.
translation_kids: A king who can listen to harsh words without flinching will have the whole world sheltering under their care.

translation: He is the light of kings who has there four things, beneficence, kindness, rectitude, and care for his people.
meaning_tamil: நலவாழ்வுக்கு வேண்டியவற்றை வழங்கியும், நிலையுணர்ந்து கருணை காட்டியும், நடுநிலை தவறாமல் ஆட்சி நடத்தியும், மக்களைப் பேணிக் காப்பதே ஓர் அரசுக்குப் புகழொளி சேர்ப்பதாகும்
meaning_english: He is the light of kings who has there four things, beneficence, kindness, rectitude, and care for his people.
translation_kids: The true light of all kings is one who has four things — generosity, kindness, fairness, and care for the people.

translation: Let a man learn thoroughly whatever he may learn, and let his conduct be worthy of his learning.
meaning_tamil: பிழை இல்லாதவற்றைத் தனது குறைகள் நீங்குமளவுக்குக் கற்றுக்கொள்ள வேண்டும் கற்ற பிறகு அதன்படி நடக்கவேண்டும்
meaning_english: Let a man learn thoroughly whatever he may learn, and let his conduct be worthy of his learning.
translation_kids: Whatever you choose to learn, learn it completely — then let everything you do reflect what you've learned.

translation: Letters and numbers are the two eyes of man.
meaning_tamil: எண்ணும் எழுத்தும் எனப்படும் அறிவுக் கண்களைப் பெற்றவர்களே, உயிர் வாழ்வோர் எனக் கருதப்படுவார்கள்
meaning_english: Letters and numbers are the two eyes of man.
translation_kids: Letters and numbers are the two eyes of every human being.

translation: The learned are said to have eyes, but the unlearned have (merely) two sores in their face.
meaning_tamil: கண்ணில்லாவிடினும் அவர் கற்றவராக இருப்பின் கண்ணுடையவராகவே கருதப்படுவார் கல்லாதவருக்குக் கண் இருப்பினும் அது புண் என்றே கருதப்படும்
meaning_english: The learned are said to have eyes, but the unlearned have (merely) two sores in their face.
translation_kids: The learned are said to have eyes — the unlearned just have two empty spots where eyes should be.

translation: It is the part of the learned to give joy to those whom they meet, and on leaving, to make them think (Oh!.
meaning_tamil: மகிழ்ச்சி பொங்கிடச் சேர்ந்து பழகுவதும், பிரிந்திட நேரும் போது மனங்கலங்குவதும் அறிவிற் சிறந்தோர் செயலாகும்
meaning_english: It is the part of the learned to give joy to those whom they meet, and on leaving, to make them think (Oh! when shall we meet them again.).
translation_kids: Truly learned people bring joy when you meet them — and leave you wishing you could talk more when they go.

translation: The unlearned are lesser to the learned, before whom they stand begging, as the very poor before the wealth.
meaning_tamil: அறிவுடையார் முன் அறிவில்லாதவர் போல் தாழ்ந்து நின்று, மேலும் கற்றுக்கொள்பவர்களின் ஆர்வத்தைக் கற்றுக் கொள்ளாதவர்கள் கடைநிலை மாந்தராக கருதப்படுவார்கள்
meaning_english: The unlearned are lesser to the learned, before whom they stand begging, as the very poor before the wealth.
translation_kids: The unlearned stand before the learned like someone poor standing before someone wealthy — always asking, never equal.

translation: Water will flow from a well in the sand in proportion to the depth to which it is dug, and.
meaning_tamil: தோண்டத் தோண்ட ஊற்றுநீர் கிடைப்பது போலத் தொடர்ந்து படிக்கப் படிக்க அறிவு பெருகிக் கொண்டே இருக்கும்
meaning_english: Water will flow from a well in the sand in proportion to the depth to which it is dug, and knowledge will flow from a man in proportion to his learning.
translation_kids: The more you dig a well in the sand, the more water flows — the more you learn, the wiser you become.

translation: How is it that any one can remain without learning, even to his death, when (to the learned man) every.
meaning_tamil: கற்றோர்க்கு எல்லா நாடுகளிலும் எல்லா ஊர்களிலும் சிறப்பு என்கிறபோது, ஒருவன் சாகும் வரையில் கற்காமல் காலம் கழிப்பது ஏனோ?
meaning_english: How is it that any one can remain without learning, even to his death, when (to the learned man) every country is his own (country), and every town his own (town) .
translation_kids: How can anyone stop learning before they die, when every stranger a learned person meets becomes a friend?

translation: The learning, which a man has get in one birth, will yield him pleasure during seven births.
meaning_tamil: ஒரு தலைமுறையில் பெறும் கல்வி அறிவானது, ஏழேழு தலைமுறைக்கும் பாதுகாப்பாக அமையும்
meaning_english: The learning, which a man has get in one birth, will yield him pleasure during seven births.
translation_kids: Knowledge you gain in one lifetime will bring you joy across seven lifetimes.

translation: The learned will long (for more learning), when they see that while it gives pleasure to themselves, the world also derives pleasure from it.
meaning_tamil: தமக்கு இன்பம் தருகின்ற கல்வியறிவு உலகத்தாருக்கும் இன்பம் தருவதைக் கண்டு, அறிஞர்கள் மேலும் மேலும் பலவற்றைக் கற்றிட விரும்புவார்கள்
meaning_english: The learned will long (for more learning), when they see that while it gives pleasure to themselves, the world also derives pleasure from it.
translation_kids: Learned people keep wanting to learn more — because their knowledge brings joy both to themselves and to everyone around them.

translation: Learning is the true lasting forever riches; all other things are not riches.
meaning_tamil: கல்வி ஒன்றே அழிவற்ற செல்வமாகும் அதற்கொப்பான சிறந்த செல்வம் வேறு எதுவும் இல்லை
meaning_english: Learning is the true lasting forever riches; all other things are not riches.
translation_kids: Knowledge is the only wealth that truly lasts — everything else is just temporary.

translation: To speak in an assembly (of the learned) without fullness of knowledge, is like playing at chess (on a board) without squares.
meaning_tamil: நிறைந்த அறிவாற்றல் இல்லாமல் அவையில் பேசுவது ஆடுவதற்கான கட்டம் போட்டுக் கொள்ளாமலே சொக்கட்டான் விளையாடுவதைப் போன்றதாகும்
meaning_english: To speak in an assembly (of the learned) without fullness of knowledge, is like playing at chess (on a board) without squares.
translation_kids: Speaking in front of experts without knowing your subject is like trying to play chess on a board with no squares.

translation: The desire of the unlearned to speak (in an assembly), is like a woman without breasts desiring (the enjoyment of ) woman-hood.
meaning_tamil: கல்லாதவனின் சொல்கேட்க விரும்புவது, மார்பகம் இல்லாத பெண்மீது மையல் கொள்வதற்கு ஒப்பானது
meaning_english: The desire of the unlearned to speak (in an assembly), is like a woman without breasts desiring (the enjoyment of ) woman-hood.
translation_kids: An uneducated person wanting to speak among experts is like wanting something you have no ability to experience.

translation: The unlearned also are very excellent men, if they know how to keep silence before the learned.
meaning_tamil: கற்றவர்களின் முன்னிலையில் எதுவும் பேசாமல் இருக்கக் கற்றிருந்தால் கல்வி கற்காதவர்கள்கூட நல்லவர்களாகவே கருதப்படுவார்கள்
meaning_english: The unlearned also are very excellent men, if they know how to keep silence before the learned.
translation_kids: Even someone without learning can be admirable — if they know how to stay quiet around those who know more.

translation: Although the natural knowledge of an unlearned man may be very good, the wise will not accept for true knowledge.
meaning_tamil: கல்வி கற்காதவனுக்கு இயற்கையாகவே அறிவு இருந்தாலும்கூட, அவனைக் கல்வியில் சிறந்தோன் என்று அறிவுடையோர் ஒப்புக் கொள்ள மாட்டார்கள்
meaning_english: Although the natural knowledge of an unlearned man may be very good, the wise will not accept for true knowledge.
translation_kids: Even if an unlearned person has good instincts, wise people won't consider it real wisdom.

translation: The self-conceit of an unlearned man will fade away, as soon as he speaks in an assembly (of.
meaning_tamil: கல்வியறிவில்லாதவர்கள் தங்களைப் பெரிய மேதைகளைப் போல் காட்டிக் கொள்ளும் போலி வேடம், கற்றுத் தேர்ந்த அறிஞர்களிடம் அவர்கள் உரையாடும்போது கலைந்து போய்விடும்
meaning_english: The self-conceit of an unlearned man will fade away, as soon as he speaks in an assembly (of.
translation_kids: The pride of an unlearned person fades the moment they open their mouth in front of experts.

translation: The unlearned are like worthless barren land: all that can be said of them is, that they exist.
meaning_tamil: கல்லாதவர்களைக் களர்நிலத்துக்கு ஒப்பிடுவதே பொருத்தமானது காரணம் அவர்கள் வெறும் நடைப்பிணங்களாகவே கருதப்படுவார்கள்
meaning_english: The unlearned are like worthless barren land: all that can be said of them is, that they exist.
translation_kids: People without knowledge are like dry, barren land — all you can say is that they take up space.

translation: The beauty and goodness of one who is without knowledge by the study of great and exquisite works, is like.
meaning_tamil: அழகான தோற்றம் மட்டுமே இருந்து, ஆழ்ந்து தெளிந்த அறிவில்லாமல் இருப்பவர்கள், கண்ணைக் கவரும் மண் பொம்மையைப் போன்றவர்களாகவே மதிக்கப்படுவார்கள்
meaning_english: The beauty and goodness of one who is without knowledge by the study of great and exquisite works, is like (the beauty and goodness) of a painted earthen doll.
translation_kids: Good looks and good behavior without deep learning is like a flower with no fragrance.

translation: Wealth, gained by the unlearned, will give more sorrow than the poverty which may come upon the learned.
meaning_tamil: முட்டாள்களிடம் குவிந்துள்ள செல்வம், நல்லவர்களை வாட்டும் வறுமையைவிட அதிக துன்பத்தைத் தரும்
meaning_english: Wealth, gained by the unlearned, will give more sorrow than the poverty which may come upon the learned.
translation_kids: Wealth in the hands of the unlearned causes more trouble than poverty in the hands of the educated.

translation: The unlearned, though born in a high caste, are not equal in respect to the learned; though they may have.
meaning_tamil: கற்றவர் என்ற பெருமை, உயர்ந்தவர் தாழ்ந்தவர் என்ற வேறுபாட்டைப் போக்கிவிடும்
meaning_english: The unlearned, though born in a high caste, are not equal in respect to the learned; though they may have been born in a low caste.
translation_kids: Someone unlearned, no matter how high their birth, cannot match the respect earned by the truly educated.

translation: As beasts by the side of men, so are other men by the side of those who are learned in celebrated works.
meaning_tamil: மனிதர்களுக்கும் விலங்குகளுக்குமிடையே என்ன வேற்றுமையோ, அதே அளவு வேற்றுமை அறிவு நூல்களைப் படித்தவர்களுக்கும், அந்த நூல்களைப் படிக்காதவர்களுக்கும் இடையே உண்டு
meaning_english: As beasts by the side of men, so are other men by the side of those who are learned in celebrated works.
translation_kids: Other people stand next to the truly learned the way animals stand next to humans.

translation: Wealth (gained) by the ear is wealth of wealth; that wealth is the chief of all wealth.
meaning_tamil: செழுமையான கருத்துகளைச் செவிவழியாகப் பெறும் செல்வமே எல்லாச் செல்வங்களுக்கும் தலையாய செல்வமாகும்
meaning_english: Wealth (gained) by the ear is wealth of wealth; that wealth is the chief of all wealth.
translation_kids: Knowledge gained through listening is the greatest wealth — it is the foundation of all other riches.

translation: When there is no food for the ear, give a little also to the stomach.
meaning_tamil: செவி வழியாக இன்பம் தரும் உணவு இல்லாதபோதே சிறிதளவு உணவு வயிற்றுக்குத் தரும் நிலை ஏற்படும்
meaning_english: When there is no food for the ear, give a little also to the stomach.
translation_kids: When there's nothing to feed your mind, give a little food to your stomach instead.

translation: Those who in this world enjoy teaching which is the food of the ear, are equal to the Gods, who.
meaning_tamil: குறைந்த உணவருந்தி நிறைந்த அறிவுடன் விளங்கும் ஆன்றோர்க்கு ஒப்பாகக் கேள்வி ஞானம் எனும் செவியுணவு அருந்துவோர் எண்ணப்படுவர்
meaning_english: Those who in this world enjoy teaching which is the food of the ear, are equal to the Gods, who enjoy the food of the sacrifices.
translation_kids: Those who enjoy the nourishment of teaching are like the gods who live on the finest food.

translation: Although a man be without learning, let him listen (to the teaching of the learned); that will be to him a staff in adversity.
meaning_tamil: நூல்களைக் கற்காவிட்டாலும், கற்றவரிடம் கேட்டுத் தெரிந்து கொண்டால், அது நடை தளர்ந்தவனுக்கு உதவிடும் ஊன்றுகோலைப் போலத் துணையாக அமையும்
meaning_english: Although a man be without learning, let him listen (to the teaching of the learned); that will be to him a staff in adversity.
translation_kids: Even if you're not a scholar, listen to wise teaching — it will be like a walking stick on a slippery road.

translation: The words of the good are like a staff in a slippery place.
meaning_tamil: வழுக்கு நிலத்தில் நடப்பதற்கு ஊன்றுகோல் உதவுவது போல் ஒழுக்கம் உடையவர்களின் அறிவுரையானது உதவும்
meaning_english: The words of the good are like a staff in a slippery place.
translation_kids: The words of good people are like a steady hand reaching out on a slippery path.

translation: Let a man listen, never so little, to good (teaching), even that will bring him great respect.
meaning_tamil: நல்லவற்றை எந்த அளவுக்குக் கேட்கிறோமோ அந்த அளவுக்குப் பெருமை கிடைக்கும் என்ற நம்பிக்கையுடன் இருக்க வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Let a man listen, never so little, to good (teaching), even that will bring him great respect.
translation_kids: Even listening to a tiny bit of good teaching will bring you great respect.

translation: Not even when they have imperfectly understood (a matter), will those men speak foolishly, who have deep studied and hardworking listened (to teaching).
meaning_tamil: எதையும் நுணுகி ஆராய்வதுடன் கேள்வி அறிவும் உடையவர்கள், சிலவற்றைப் பற்றித் தவறாக உணர்ந்திருந்தாலும் கூட, அப்போதும் அறிவற்ற முறையில் பேசமாட்டார்கள்
meaning_english: Not even when they have imperfectly understood (a matter), will those men speak foolishly, who have deep studied and hardworking listened (to teaching).
translation_kids: Those who have listened carefully and studied deeply will never speak foolishly — even when they only partly understand.

translation: The ear which has not been bored by teaching, although it hears, is deaf.
meaning_tamil: இயற்கையாகவே கேட்கக்கூடிய காதுகளாக இருந்தாலும் அவை நல்லோர் உரைகளைக் கேட்க மறுத்தால் செவிட்டுக் காதுகள் என்றே கூறப்படும்
meaning_english: The ear which has not been bored by teaching, although it hears, is deaf.
translation_kids: An ear that hasn't been filled with real learning is just a decoration — it hears, but doesn't understand.

translation: It is a rare thing to find modesty, a reverend mouth- with those who have not received choice teaching.
meaning_tamil: தெளிவான கேள்வியறிவு இல்லாதவர்கள், அடக்கமாகப் பேசும் அமைதியான பண்புடையவர்களாக இருக்க இயலாது
meaning_english: It is a rare thing to find modesty, a reverend mouth- with those who have not received choice teaching.
translation_kids: Humility and a respectful way of speaking rarely exist in those who haven't received good teaching.

translation: What does it matter whether those men live or die, who can judge of tastes by the mouth, and not by the ear .
meaning_tamil: செவிச்சுவை உணராமல் வாயின் சுவைக்காக மட்டுமே வாழும் மக்கள் உயிரோடு இருப்பதும் ஒன்றுதான் இல்லாமற் போவதும் ஒன்றுதான்
meaning_english: What does it matter whether those men live or die, who can judge of tastes by the mouth, and not by the ear .
translation_kids: People who only taste food with their mouth but never taste ideas with their mind — what does it matter if they live or die?

translation: Wisdom is a weapon to ward off destruction; it is an inner fort which enemies cannot destroy.
meaning_tamil: பகையால் அழிவு வாராமல் பாதுகாக்கும் அரண், அறிவு ஒன்றுதான்
meaning_english: Wisdom is a weapon to ward off destruction; it is an inner fort which enemies cannot destroy.
translation_kids: Wisdom is a weapon that protects you from destruction — and an inner fortress that no enemy can break into.

translation: Not to permit the mind to go where it lists, to keep it from evil, and to employ it in good, this is wisdom.
meaning_tamil: மனம் போகும் வழியெல்லாம் போக விடாமல் தீய வழிகளைத் தள்ளிவிட்டு, நல்வழியைத் தேர்வு செய்வதே அறிவுடைமையாகும்
meaning_english: Not to permit the mind to go where it lists, to keep it from evil, and to employ it in good, this is wisdom.
translation_kids: Wisdom means keeping your mind from running wild, turning it away from bad things, and pointing it toward good.

translation: To understand the truth in every thing, by whomsoever spoken, is wisdom.
meaning_tamil: எந்தவொரு பொருள்குறித்து எவர் எதைச் சொன்னாலும், அதை அப்படியே நம்பி ஏற்றுக் கொள்ளாமல் உண்மை எது என்பதை ஆராய்ந்து தெளிவதுதான் அறிவுடைமையாகும்
meaning_english: To understand the truth in every thing, by whomsoever spoken, is wisdom.
translation_kids: True wisdom is being able to see the truth in anything — no matter who says it.

translation: To speak so as that the meaning may easily enter the mind of the hearer, and to understand the subtlest.
meaning_tamil: நாம் சொல்ல வேண்டியவைகளை எளிய முறையில் கேட்போரின் இதயத்தில் பதியுமாறு சொல்லிப் பிறர் சொல்லும் நுட்பமான கருத்துக்களையும் ஆராய்ந்து தெளிவதே அறிவுடைமையாகும்
meaning_english: To speak so as that the meaning may easily enter the mind of the hearer, and to understand the subtlest thought which may lie hidden in the words of others, this is wisdom.
translation_kids: Wisdom is the ability to explain things so clearly others understand instantly — and to understand the deepest ideas yourself.

translation: To secure the friendship of the great is true wisdom; it is (also) wisdom to keep (that friendship unchanged, and).
meaning_tamil: உயர்ந்தோரே உலகோர் எனப்படுவதால் அவர்களுடன் நட்பு கொண்டு இன்பம் துன்பம் ஆகிய இரண்டையும் ஒரே நிலையாகக் கருதுவதே அறிவுடைமையாகும்
meaning_english: To secure the friendship of the great is true wisdom; it is (also) wisdom to keep (that friendship unchanged, and) not opening and closing (like the lotus flower).
translation_kids: Winning the friendship of great people is wisdom — and keeping that friendship is even greater wisdom.

translation: To live as the world lives, is wisdom.
meaning_tamil: உயர்ந்தோர் வழியில் உலகம் எவ்வாறு நடைபெறுகின்றதோ அதற்கேற்ப நடந்து கொள்வதே அறிவாகும்
meaning_english: To live as the world lives, is wisdom.
translation_kids: Knowing how to live well among others is wisdom.

translation: The wise are those who know beforehand what will happen; those who do not know this are the unwise.
meaning_tamil: ஒரு விளைவுக்கு எதிர் விளைவு எப்படியிருக்குமென அறிவுடையவர்கள்தான் சிந்திப்பார்கள்; அறிவில்லாதவர்கள் சிந்திக்க மாட்டார்கள்
meaning_english: The wise are those who know beforehand what will happen; those who do not know this are the unwise.
translation_kids: Wise people are those who can see what's coming before it arrives — those who can't are not wise.

translation: Not to fear what ought to be feared, is folly; it is the work of the wise to fear what should be feared.
meaning_tamil: அறிவில்லாதவர்கள்தான் அஞ்ச வேண்டியதற்கு அஞ்ச மாட்டார்கள் அறிஞர்கள் மட்டுமே அஞ்ச வேண்டியதற்கு அஞ்சுவார்கள்
meaning_english: Not to fear what ought to be feared, is folly; it is the work of the wise to fear what should be feared.
translation_kids: Not fearing what you should fear is foolish — real wisdom means knowing exactly what deserves your respect.

translation: No terrifying calamity will happen to the wise, who (foresee) and guard against coming evils.
meaning_tamil: வருமுன் அறிந்து காத்துக்கொள்ளும் திறனுடையவர்களுக்கு அதிர்ச்சி தரக்கூடிய துன்பம் ஏற்படாது
meaning_english: No terrifying calamity will happen to the wise, who (foresee) and guard against coming evils.
translation_kids: No terrible disaster will catch the wise person off guard — because they see trouble coming and get ready.

translation: Those who have wisdom, have every thing; those who have not wisdom, whatever they may have, have nothing.
meaning_tamil: அறிவு இல்லாதவர்களுக்கு வேறு எது இருந்தாலும் பெருமையில்லை; அறிவு உள்ளவர்களுக்கு வேறு எது இல்லாவிட்டாலும் சிறுமை இல்லை
meaning_english: Those who have wisdom, have every thing; those who have not wisdom, whatever they may have, have nothing.
translation_kids: Those with wisdom have everything — those without it have nothing, no matter how much they own.

translation: Truly great is the excellence of those (kings) who are free from pride, anger, and lust.
meaning_tamil: இறுமாப்பு, ஆத்திரம், இழிவான நடத்தை இவைகள் இல்லாதவர்களுடைய செல்வாக்குதான் மதிக்கத் தக்கதாகும்
meaning_english: Truly great is the excellence of those (kings) who are free from pride, anger, and lust.
translation_kids: Truly great leaders are those free from pride, anger, and selfish desire.

translation: Avarice, undignified pride, and low pleasures are faults in a king.
meaning_tamil: மனத்தில் பேராசை, மான உணர்வில் ஊனம், மாசுபடியும் செயல்களில் மகிழ்ச்சி ஆகியவை தலைமைக்குரிய தகுதிக்கே பெருங்கேடுகளாகும்
meaning_english: Avarice, undignified pride, and low pleasures are faults in a king.
translation_kids: Greed, false pride, and low pleasures are the flaws that ruin a leader.

translation: Those who fear guilt, if they commit a fault small as a millet seed, will consider it to be as large as a palmyra tree.
meaning_tamil: பழிக்கு நாணுகின்றவர்கள், தினையளவு குற்றத்தையும் பனையளவாகக் கருதி, அதைச் செய்யாமல், தங்களைக் காத்துக் கொள்வார்கள்
meaning_english: Those who fear guilt, if they commit a fault small as a millet seed, will consider it to be as large as a palmyra tree.
translation_kids: Those who truly fear doing wrong will treat even a tiny mistake like a huge problem.

translation: Guard against faults as a matter (of great consequence; for) faults are a deadly enemy.
meaning_tamil: குற்றம் புரிவது அழிவை உண்டாக்கக் கூடிய பகையாக மாறுவதால் குற்றம் புரியாமல் இருப்பது என்பதையே நோக்கமாகக் கொள்ள வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Guard against faults as a matter (of great consequence; for) faults are a deadly enemy.
translation_kids: Guard against your faults like they're your deadliest enemy — because they are.

translation: The success and happiness of him who does not timely guard against faults, will perish like straw before fire.
meaning_tamil: முன்கூட்டியே எச்சரிக்கையாக இருந்து ஒரு தவறான செயலைத் தவிர்த்துக் கொள்ளாதவருடைய வாழ்க்கையானது நெருப்பின் முன்னால் உள்ள வைக்கோல் போர் போலக் கருகிவிடும்
meaning_english: The success and happiness of him who does not timely guard against faults, will perish like straw before fire.
translation_kids: The success of someone who doesn't fix their faults in time will burn away like straw in a fire.

translation: What fault will remain in the king who has put away his own evils, and looks after the evils of others.
meaning_tamil: முதலில் தனக்குள்ள குறையை நீக்கிக் கொண்டு அதன் பின்னர் பிறர் குறையைக் கண்டு சொல்லும் தலைவனுக்கு என்ன குறை நேரும்?
meaning_english: What fault will remain in the king who has put away his own evils, and looks after the evils of others.
translation_kids: A king who has removed their own faults and keeps watch over others' wrongs will have very little left to worry about.

translation: The wealth of the avaricious man, who does not expend it for the purposes for which he ought to expend.
meaning_tamil: நற்பணிகளைச் செய்யாமல் சேமித்து வைக்கப்படும் கருமியின் செல்வம் பயன் ஏதுமின்றிப் பாழாகிவிடும்
meaning_english: The wealth of the avaricious man, who does not expend it for the purposes for which he ought to expend it will waste away and not continue.
translation_kids: The wealth of a greedy person who never uses it the right way is like a tree with fruit no one is allowed to eat.

translation: Griping avarice is not to be reckoned as one among other faults; (it stands alone - greater than all).
meaning_tamil: எல்லாக் குற்றங்களையும்விடத் தனிப்பெருங் குற்றமாகக் கருதப்படுவது பொருள் சேர்ப்பதில் பற்றுக்கொண்டு எவருக்கும் எதுவும் ஈயாமல் வாழ்வதுதான்
meaning_english: Griping avarice is not to be reckoned as one among other faults; (it stands alone - greater than all).
translation_kids: Greedy selfishness is not just one fault among many — it stands alone, greater than all other faults.

translation: Let no (one) praise himself, at any time; let him not desire to do useless things.
meaning_tamil: எந்தவொரு காலகட்டத்திலும் தன்னைத்தானே உயர்வாக எண்ணிடும் தற்பெருமைகொண்டு நன்மை தராத செயல்களில் ஈடுபடக் கூடாது
meaning_english: Let no (one) praise himself, at any time; let him not desire to do useless things.
translation_kids: Never brag about yourself — and never waste your time on things that serve no purpose.

translation: If (a king) enjoys, privately the things which he desires, the designs of his enemies will be useless.
meaning_tamil: தமது விருப்பத்தைப் பகைவர் அறிந்து கொள்ள முடியாமல் நிறைவேற்றுபவரிடம் அந்தப் பகைவரின் எண்ணம் பலிக்காமற் போய்விடும்
meaning_english: If (a king) enjoys, privately the things which he desires, the designs of his enemies will be useless.
translation_kids: If a leader enjoys their private pleasures quietly without showing off, their enemies' plans will come to nothing.

translation: Let (a king) ponder well its value, and secure the friendship of men of goodness and of mature knowledge.
meaning_tamil: அறமுணர்ந்த மூதறிஞர்களின் நட்பைப் பெறும் வகை அறிந்து, அதனைத் தேர்ந்தெடுத்துக் கொள்ள வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Let (a king) ponder well its value, and secure the friendship of men of goodness and of mature knowledge.
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: Think carefully about its value, and build friendships with people who are both good and wise.

translation: Let (a king) procure and kindly care for men who can overcome difficulties when they occur, and guard against them before they happen.
meaning_tamil: வந்துள்ள துன்பத்தைப் போக்கி, மேலும் துன்பம் நேராமல் காக்கவல்ல பெரியோர்களைத் துணையாகக் கொள்ள வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Let (a king) procure and kindly care for men who can overcome difficulties when they occur, and guard against them before they happen.
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: Find and take good care of people who can handle tough situations and also prepare for problems before they happen.

translation: To cherish great men and make them his own, is the most difficult of all difficult things.
meaning_tamil: பெரியவர்களைப் போற்றிப் பாராட்டி அவர்களுடன் உறவாடுதல் எல்லாப் பேறுகளையும் விடப் பெரும் பேறாகும்
meaning_english: To cherish great men and make them his own, is the most difficult of all difficult things.
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: Getting truly great people to be on your side is the hardest thing there is.

translation: So to act as to make those men, his own, who are greater than himself is of all powers the highest.
meaning_tamil: அறிவு ஆற்றல் ஆகியவற்றில் தம்மைக் காட்டிலும் சிறந்த பெரியவராய் இருப்பவரோடு உறவுகொண்டு அவர்வழி நடப்பது மிகப்பெரும் வலிமையாக அமையும்
meaning_english: So to act as to make those men, his own, who are greater than himself is of all powers the highest.
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: Being able to win over people who are better than you is the greatest power anyone can have.

translation: As a king must use his advisor as eyes (in managing his kingdom), let him well examine their character and qualifications before he engages them.
meaning_tamil: கண்ணாக இருந்து எதனையும் கண்டறிந்து கூறும் அறிஞர் பெருமக்களைச் சூழ வைத்துக் கொண்டிருப்பதே ஆட்சியாளர்க்கு நன்மை பயக்கும்
meaning_english: As a king must use his advisor as eyes (in managing his kingdom), let him well examine their character and qualifications before he engages them.
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: A leader must treat their advisors like eyes — and check their character and abilities very carefully before trusting them.

translation: There will be nothing left for enemies to do, against him who has the power of acting (so as to.
meaning_tamil: அறிவும், ஆற்றலும் கொண்ட ஒருவன், தன்னைச் சூழவும் அத்தகையோரையே கொண்டிருந்தால் பகைவர்களால் எந்தத் தீங்கையும் விளைவிக்க முடியாது
meaning_english: There will be nothing left for enemies to do, against him who has the power of acting (so as to secure) the fellowship of worthy men.
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: No enemy can do anything against a leader who knows how to act with people who speak up when something is wrong.

translation: Who are great enough to destroy him who has servants that have power to rebuke him .
meaning_tamil: இடித்துரைத்து நல்வழி காட்டுபவரின் துணையைப் பெற்று நடப்பவர்களைக் கெடுக்கும் ஆற்றல் யாருக்கு உண்டு?
meaning_english: Who are great enough to destroy him who has servants that have power to rebuke him .
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: Who is great enough to bring down a leader whose own people can honestly point out their mistakes?

translation: The king, who is without the guard of men who can rebuke him, will perish, even though there be no one to destroy him.
meaning_tamil: குறையை உணர்த்துவோர் இல்லாத அரசு தானாகவே கெடும்
meaning_english: The king, who is without the guard of men who can rebuke him, will perish, even though there be no one to destroy him.
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: A leader with no one around to correct them will fall apart — even with no enemies around to push them down.

translation: There can be no gain to those who have no capital; and in like manner there can be no permanence to.
meaning_tamil: கட்டடத்தைத் தாங்கும் தூண் போலத் தம்மைத் தாங்கி நிற்கக் கூடிய துணையில்லாதவர்களின் நிலை, முதலீடு செய்யாத வாணிபத்தில் வருவாய் இல்லாத நிலையைப் போன்றதேயாகும்
meaning_english: There can be no gain to those who have no capital; and in like manner there can be no permanence to.
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: Just as there's no gain without starting capital, a leader can't last without people who will speak hard truths.

translation: It is tenfold more injurious to abandon the friendship of the good, than to incur the hatred of the many.
meaning_tamil: நல்லவர்களின் தொடர்பைக் கைவிடுவது என்பது பலருடைய பகையைத் தேடிக் கொள்வதை விடக் கேடு விளைவிக்கக் கூடியதாகும்
meaning_english: It is tenfold more injurious to abandon the friendship of the good, than to incur the hatred of the many.
chapter_english: Seeking the Aid of Great Men
translation_kids: Losing the friendship of good people is ten times more harmful than earning the hatred of many.

translation: (True) greatness fears the society of the base; it is only the low - minded who will regard them as friends.
meaning_tamil: பெரியோர், கீழ்மக்களின் கூட்டத்தோடு சேர மாட்டார்கள் ஆனால் சிறியோர்களோ இனம் இனத்தோடு சேருமென்பதுபோல் அந்தக் கீழ் மக்கள் கூட்டத்துடன் சேர்ந்து கொள்வார்கள்
meaning_english: (True) greatness fears the society of the base; it is only the low - minded who will regard them as friends.
translation_kids: Truly great people avoid the company of small-minded people — only those with low values see them as friends.

translation: As water changes (its nature), from the nature of the soil (in which it flows), so will the character of.
meaning_tamil: சேர்ந்த நிலத்தின் தன்மையால் நீரானது வேறுபட்டு அந்த நிலத்தின் தன்மையை அடைந்துவிடும் அதுபோல மக்களின் அறிவும், தாங்கள் சேர்ந்த இனத்தின் தன்மையைப் பெற்றதாகிவிடும்
meaning_english: As water changes (its nature), from the nature of the soil (in which it flows), so will the character of men resemble that of their associates.
translation_kids: Just as water takes on the nature of the soil it flows through, a person takes on the nature of their company.

translation: The power of knowing is from the mind; (but) his character is from that of his associates.
meaning_tamil: ஒருவரின் உணர்ச்சி, மனத்தைப் பொருத்து அமையும் அவர் இப்படிப்பட்டவர் என்று அளந்து சொல்வது அவர் சேர்ந்திடும் கூட்டத்தைப் பொருத்து அமையும்
meaning_english: The power of knowing is from the mind; (but) his character is from that of his associates.
translation_kids: Your thinking comes from within — but your true character comes from the people you spend time with.

translation: Wisdom appears to rest in the mind, but it really exists to a man in his companions.
meaning_tamil: ஒருவரின் அறிவு அவரது மனத்தின் இயல்பு என்பது போல் தோன்றினாலும், அது அவர் சேர்ந்த கூட்டத்தாரின் தொடர்பால் வெளிப்படுவதேயாகும்
meaning_english: Wisdom appears to rest in the mind, but it really exists to a man in his companions.
translation_kids: Wisdom looks like it lives in your mind — but it really grows from the people who surround you.

translation: Chaste company is the staff on which come, these two things, viz, purity of mind and purity of conduct.
meaning_tamil: ஒருவன் கொண்டுள்ள தொடர்பு தூய்மையானதாக இருந்தால்தான் அவனுடைய மனமும் செயலும் தூய்மையானவையாக இருக்கும்
meaning_english: Chaste company is the staff on which come, these two things, viz, purity of mind and purity of conduct.
translation_kids: Good company is the support that holds up both a clean mind and clean behavior.

translation: To the pure-minded there will be a good posterity By those whose associates are pure, no deeds will be done that are not good.
meaning_tamil: மனத்தின் தூய்மையால் புகழும், சேர்ந்த இனத்தின் தூய்மையால் நற்செயல்களும் விளையும்
meaning_english: To the pure-minded there will be a good posterity By those whose associates are pure, no deeds will be done that are not good.
translation_kids: Those with good friends will raise good children — and those with good companions never end up doing wrong.

translation: Goodness of mind will give wealth, and good society will bring with it all praise, to men.
meaning_tamil: மனத்தின் நலம் உயிருக்கு ஆக்கமாக விளங்கும் இனத்தின் நலமோ எல்லாப் புகழையும் வழங்கும்
meaning_english: Goodness of mind will give wealth, and good society will bring with it all praise, to men.
translation_kids: A good heart brings you wealth — and good company brings you all the praise worth having.

translation: Yet good companionship is confirmation strong.
meaning_tamil: மனவளம் மிக்க சான்றோராக இருப்பினும் அவர் சேர்ந்துள்ள கூட்டத்தினரைப் பொருத்தே வலிமை வந்து வாய்க்கும்
meaning_english: Yet good companionship is confirmation strong.
translation_kids: Even a wavering mind becomes steady and strong through good friendship.

translation: Future bliss is (the result) of goodness of mind; and even this get strength from the society of the good.
meaning_tamil: நல்ல உறுதியான உள்ளம் படைத்த உயர்ந்தோராக இருந்தாலும் அவர் சார்ந்த இனத்தின் உறுதியும் அவருக்கு வலிமையான துணையாக அமையக் கூடியதாகும்
meaning_english: Future bliss is (the result) of goodness of mind; and even this get strength from the society of the good.
translation_kids: Future happiness comes from a good heart — and even that grows stronger through the company of good people.

translation: There is no greater help than the company of the good; there is no greater source of sorrow than the company of the wicked.
meaning_tamil: நல்ல இனத்தைக் காட்டிலும் துணையாக இருப்பதும், தீய இனத்தைக் காட்டிலும் துன்பம் தரக்கூடியதும் எதுவுமே இல்லை
meaning_english: There is no greater help than the company of the good; there is no greater source of sorrow than the company of the wicked.
translation_kids: Nothing helps you more than being around good people — nothing hurts you more than being around bad ones.

translation: Let a man reflect on what will be lost, what will be get and (from these) what will be his.
meaning_tamil: எந்த அளவுக்கு நன்மை கிடைக்கும் அல்லது தீமை ஏற்படும் என்று விளைவுகளைக் கணக்குப் பார்த்த பிறதே ஒரு செயலில் இறங்க வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Let a man reflect on what will be lost, what will be get and (from these) what will be his ultimate gain, and (then, let him) act.
translation_kids: Before acting, think about what you might lose, what you might gain, and what your situation really is.

translation: There is nothing too difficult to (be attained by) those who, before they act, reflect well themselves, and thoroughly consider (the matter) with chosen friends.
meaning_tamil: தெளிந்து தேர்ந்த நண்பர்களுடன், சேர்ந்து, ஆற்ற வேண்டிய செயலை ஆராய்ந்து, தாமும் நன்கு சிந்தித்துச் செய்தால் ஆகாதது ஒன்றுமில்லை
meaning_english: There is nothing too difficult to (be attained by) those who, before they act, reflect well themselves, and thoroughly consider (the matter) with chosen friends.
translation_kids: Nothing is too hard for those who think it through carefully themselves and also talk it over with trusted friends.

translation: Wise men will not, in the hopes of profit, undertake works that will consume their principal.
meaning_tamil: பெரும் ஆதாயம் கிட்டுமென்று எதிர்பார்த்துக் கை முதலையும் இழந்து விடக்கூடிய காரியத்தை அறிவுடையவர்கள் செய்யமாட்டார்கள்
meaning_english: Wise men will not, in the hopes of profit, undertake works that will consume their principal.
translation_kids: Wise people won't take on work that will eat up everything they've already built — even for the hope of profit.

translation: Those who fear reproach will not commence anything which has not been (thoroughly considered) and made clear to them.
meaning_tamil: களங்கத்துக்குப் பயப்படக் கூடியவர்கள்தான் விளைவுகளை எண்ணிப் பார்த்து அந்தக் களங்கம் தரும் காரியத்தில் இறங்காமல் இருப்பார்கள்
meaning_english: Those who fear reproach will not commence anything which has not been (thoroughly considered) and made clear to them.
translation_kids: Those who fear being embarrassed will never start anything they haven't fully thought through.

translation: One way to promote the success and happiness of an enemy, is (for a king) to set out (to war).
meaning_tamil: முன்னேற்பாடுகளை முழுமையாக ஆராய்ந்து செய்யாமல் பகைவரை ஒடுக்க முனைவது அந்தப் பகைவரின் வலிமையை நிலையாக வளர்க்கும் வழியாக ஆகிவிடும்
meaning_english: One way to promote the success and happiness of an enemy, is (for a king) to set out (to war) without having thoroughly weighed his ability (to cope with its chances).
translation_kids: One way to help your enemy succeed is to rush into action without a clear plan.

translation: He will perish who does not what is not fit to do; and he also will perish who does not.
meaning_tamil: செய்யக் கூடாததைச் செய்வதால் கேடு ஏற்படும்; செய்ய வேண்டியதைச் செய்யாமல் விட்டாலும் கேடு ஏற்படும்
meaning_english: He will perish who does not what is not fit to do; and he also will perish who does not do what it is fit to.
translation_kids: Anyone who does what shouldn't be done will suffer — and so will anyone who fails to do what should be done.

translation: Consider, and then undertake a matter; after having undertaken it, to say "We will consider," is folly.
meaning_tamil: நன்றாகச் சிந்தித்த பிறகே செயலில் இறங்க வேண்டும்; இறங்கிய பிறகு சிந்திக்கலாம் என்பது தவறு
meaning_english: Consider, and then undertake a matter; after having undertaken it, to say "We will consider," is folly.
translation_kids: Think before you start something — saying "let me think about it" after you've already begun is just foolishness.

translation: The work, which is not done by suitable methods, will fail though many stand to uphold it.
meaning_tamil: எத்தனை பேர்தான் துணையாக இருந்தாலும் முறையாகச் செய்யப்படாத முயற்சி இறுதியில் முடங்கிப் போய்விடும்
meaning_english: The work, which is not done by suitable methods, will fail though many stand to uphold it.
translation_kids: Work done the wrong way will fail — even if a hundred people are holding it up.

translation: There are failures even in acting well, when it is done without knowing the various dispositions of men.
meaning_tamil: ஒருவருடைய இயல்பைப் புரிந்து கொண்டுதான் நன்மையைக் கூடச் செய்ய வேண்டும் இல்லாவிட்டால் அதுவே தீமையாகத் திருப்பித் தாக்கும்
meaning_english: There are failures even in acting well, when it is done without knowing the various dispositions of men.
translation_kids: Even doing the right thing can go wrong if you don't understand the different kinds of people you're dealing with.

translation: Let a man reflect, and do things which bring no reproach; the world will not approve, with him, of things.
meaning_tamil: தம்முடைய நிலைமைக்கு மாறான செயல்களை உயர்ந்தோர் பாராட்டமாட்டார்கள் என்பதால், அவர்கள் பழித்துரைக்காத செயல்களையே செய்திடல் வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Let a man reflect, and do things which bring no reproach; the world will not approve, with him, of things which do not become of his position to adopt.
translation_kids: Think carefully and do things that bring no shame — the world won't support you in things it can't be proud of.

translation: Let (one) weigh well the strength of the deed (he purposes to do), his own strength, the strength of his.
meaning_tamil: செயலின் வலிமை, தனது வலிமை, பகைவரின் வலிமை, இருசாராருக்கும் துணையாக இருப்போரின் வலிமை ஆகியவற்றை ஆராய்ந்தறிந்தே அந்தச் செயலில் ஈடுபட வேண்டும்
meaning_english: Let (one) weigh well the strength of the deed (he purposes to do), his own strength, the strength of his enemy, and the strength of the allies (of both), and then let him act.
translation_kids: Before acting, weigh the size of the task, your own strength, your helpers' strength, and the right moment.

translation: There is nothing which may not be accomplished by those who, before they attack (an enemy), make themselves acquainted with.
meaning_tamil: ஒரு செயலில் ஈடுபடும்போது அச்செயலைப் பற்றிய அனைத்தையும் ஆராய்ந்தறிந்து முயற்சி மேற்கொண்டால் முடியாதது எதுவுமில்லை
meaning_english: There is nothing which may not be accomplished by those who, before they attack (an enemy), make themselves acquainted with their own ability, and with whatever else is (needful) to be known, and.
translation_kids: Nothing is impossible for those who learn their enemy's weaknesses before they make their move.

translation: There are many who, ignorant of their (want of) power (to meet it), have haughtily set out to war, and.
meaning_tamil: தம்முடைய வலிமையின் அளவை அறியாமல் உணர்ச்சி வயப்பட்டு ஒரு செயலைத் தொடங்கி இடையில் கெட்டுப் போனவர்கள் பலர் உண்டு
meaning_english: There are many who, ignorant of their (want of) power (to meet it), have haughtily set out to war, and broken down in the midst of it.
translation_kids: Many people have rushed into fights without knowing their own limits — and came out looking very foolish.

translation: He will quickly perish who, ignorant of his own resources flatters himself of his greatness, and does.
meaning_tamil: மற்றவர்களை மதிக்காமலும், தன் வலிமையை உணர்ந்து கொள்ளாமலும், தன்னைத் தானே பெரிதாக விளம்பரப் படுத்திக் கொண்டிருப்பவர்கள் விரைவில் கெட்டுத் தொலைவார்கள்
meaning_english: He will quickly perish who, ignorant of his own resources flatters himself of his greatness, and does.
translation_kids: Anyone who flatters themselves about being powerful without checking their real resources will fall fast.

translation: The axle tree of a bandy, loaded only with peacocks' feathers will break, if it be greatly overloaded.
meaning_tamil: மயில் இறகாக இருந்தாலும்கூட அதிகமாக ஏற்றப்பட்டால் வண்டியின் அச்சு முரிகின்ற அளவுக்கு அதற்குப் பலம் வந்து விடும்
